## Summary

- 

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Configuration example
- [ ] Terraform example
- [ ] ECS task definition example
- [ ] Observability design note

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is safe for a public reference repository
- [ ] Placeholder values are used for accounts, domains, hosts, and environment-specific names
- [ ] IAM permissions remain narrow and explainable
- [ ] Logging examples avoid secrets, tokens, request bodies, and sensitive payloads
- [ ] Retention, indexing, or cost assumptions are documented where relevant
- [ ] README links and repository structure remain accurate
- [ ] Production caveats are documented where the example needs adaptation

## Testing / Validation

Describe any manual review, syntax check, or documentation preview completed.
